news.title: Mining stocks send ASX lower in early trade; Coles shares jump
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket has opened lower after drops for computer chipmakers and other winners of the artificial-intelligence boom dragged down stock markets worldwide overnight.

news.title: ‘Brazen corruption’: Trump’s company set to sell faster access to president’s market-moving posts
news.snippet: The move would allow Wall Street trading firms and other institutions to get news from Truth Social contributors in milliseconds so they could profit off subsequent moves in stocks, bonds and interest rates.

news.title: H3 Energy seismic reprocessing lights up WA gas prize
news.snippet: H3 Energy says reprocessing of legacy seismic data has delivered a major lift at its WA Warro gas field, refining the company’s hunt for new hydrocarbon potential and deeper targets.

news.title: Geochem points Critical Resources towards next Canadian lithium prize
news.snippet: Critical Resources’ latest geochemistry from Mavis Lake has confirmed highly fertile lithium pegmatites, refining drill targets for Canadian resource expansion.

news.title: Scandal-plagued Aussie travel giant loses its chief legal officer
news.snippet: The resignation comes as Corporate Travel Management meets with the British government to work out repayments for overcharging it for housing asylum seekers.

news.title: Telstra Senate inquiry LIVE updates: Newer hardware would have stopped outage
news.snippet: Follow our live coverage of the Senate inquiry into last week’s Telstra outage.

news.title: How motherhood has changed things for BMX racer Lauren Reynolds
‘Our controls were not good enough’: Telstra’s outage admission
news.snippet: In a submission lodged hours before Friday’s Senate hearing, Telstra says a software update was never applied to the device that triggered the outage.

news.title: UK urges FIFA to act after Argentine players hold up Falklands banner
I ended up in a Medicare urgent care clinic … and I liked it
news.snippet: A badly rolled ankle landed Millie Muroi at a new urgent care clinic in Perth. Four hours later, she hobbled away with an unexpected prognosis.

news.title: Spain trains in 'hazardous' air as wildfire smoke drifts from Canada
Rider suffers fractured collarbone in chaotic end to Tour de France stage
